title: Stanford study says 5-minute Bitcoin prediction markets enable settlement manipulation
summary: Researchers found that Polymarket’s five-minute Bitcoin prediction markets create incentives to manipulate spot prices around contract settlement, proposing longer settlement windows as a potential fix.

title: Asian Equities Drop Led by Kospi, Oil Extends Gain: Markets Wrap

title: Japan PE Fund Seeks $1.9 Billion Economic-Security Investments
summary: Advantage Partners LLC plans to invest in big domestic companies posing economic security risks for Japan that might benefit from government backing and boost profits in the long term.
